description_long: This is a robust, rectangular green container with reinforced black bands running vertically along its sides and a central gray stripe across the top. The front and back faces feature a series of vertical black slats, likely for ventilation or structural reinforcement. The ends of the container are flat and display a pair of metallic latches or locking mechanisms, suggesting secure closure. The surface appears to be made of painted metal, giving it a durable and industrial look suitable for urban or transportation environments. The container is likely hollow inside, designed to store or transport goods securely. Its overall design is utilitarian, emphasizing strength and protection for its contents.
description: A sturdy green metal container with black reinforcement bands, vertical slats on the sides, and metallic latches on the ends, designed for secure storage or transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing vertical black slats, central gray stripe, and black reinforcement bands.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a flat green panel with two metallic latches and gray corner accents.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with vertical black slats and a central gray stripe.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, with flat green panel and metallic latches.
